allow: PowerShell(cd c:\\queening; $r = try { \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://localhost:5173/ -TimeoutSec 3 -UseBasicParsing\).StatusCode } catch { "DOWN" }; "dev server: $r")

PowerShell(cd c:\\queening; foreach \($t in @\('verify','verify:talk','verify:romance','verify:sheets','verify:chars','verify:providers','verify:ai','verify:flags','verify:fallback'\)\) { "=== $t ==="; npm run $t 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern "FAIL|런타임 에러" })
PowerShell(cd c:\\queening; foreach \($t in @\('verify','verify:talk','verify:romance','verify:chars','verify:chance'\)\) { "=== $t ==="; npm run $t 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern "FAIL|런타임 에러|콘솔" })

PowerShell(cd c:\\queening; npm run typecheck; foreach \($t in @\('verify','verify:chance','verify:sheets','verify:providers','verify:ai','verify:flags','verify:fallback','verify:talk','verify:romance','verify:chars'\)\) { "=== $t ==="; npm run $t 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern "FAIL|런타임 에러|콘솔" })
